description: You are an Information Security Engineer at a FinTech startup. A recent penetration test flagged five critical cryptographic vulnerabilities in your core 'crypto_utils' library, detailed in the audit report at /home/ga/workspace/fintech_crypto/audit_report.txt. Refactor the code in the 'crypto_utils' folder to address all vulnerabilities identified in the report. Ensure the data processing pipeline (process_dataset.py) runs successfully to generate the encrypted bank dataset at data/output_encrypted.csv.
